transactions.description: Toronto Blue Jays sent RHP Dylan Cease on a rehab assignment to Buffalo Bisons.
Los Angeles Dodgers sent RHP Evan Phillips on a rehab assignment to Oklahoma City Comets.
Boston Red Sox selected the contract of RHP Tommy Kahnle from Worcester Red Sox.
Buffalo Bisons sent C C.J. Stubbs on a rehab assignment to Dunedin Blue Jays.
LHP Rob Kaminsky assigned to Salt Lake Bees from ACL Angels.
Kansas City Royals optioned RHP Eli Morgan to Omaha Storm Chasers.
Omaha Storm Chasers activated RHP Eli Morgan.
3B Noah Mendlinger assigned to Memphis Redbirds from Springfield Cardinals.
Philadelphia Phillies activated RHP Max Lazar from the 60-day injured list.
San Francisco Giants placed CF Harrison Bader on the 10-day injured list. Left plantar fasciitis.
Philadelphia Phillies optioned RHP Max Lazar to Lehigh Valley IronPigs.
Lehigh Valley IronPigs activated RHP Max Lazar.
